problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
